ns0:entry.ns0:title: GorvGoyl/Clone-Wars
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GorvGoyl/Clone-Wars
Language: unknown
100+ open-source clones of popular sites like Airbnb, Amazon, Instagram, Netflix, Tiktok, Spotify, Whatsapp, Youtube etc. See source code, demo links, tech stack, github stars.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Johnshall/Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules-Forever
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Johnshall/Shadowrocket-ADBlock-Rules-Forever
Language: unknown
提供多款 Shadowrocket 规则，拥有强劲的广告过滤功能。每日 8 时重新构建规则。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PicoTrex/Awesome-Nano-Banana-images
Language: unknown
A curated collection of fun and creative examples generated with Nano Banana & Nano Banana Pro🍌, Gemini-2.5-flash-image based model. We also release Nano-consistent-150K openly to support the community's development of image generation and unified models(click to website to see our blog)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
Language: unknown
张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anderspitman/awesome-tunneling
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anderspitman/awesome-tunneling
Language: unknown
List of ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, Tailscale, and ZeroTier alternatives and other tunneling software and services. Focus on self-hosting.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: blader/humanizer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/blader/humanizer
Language: unknown
Claude Code skill that removes signs of AI-generated writing from text

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bleedline/aimoneyhunter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bleedline/aimoneyhunter
Language: unknown
ai副业赚钱大集合，教你如何利用ai做一些副业项目，赚取更多额外收益。The Ultimate Guide to Making Money with AI Side Hustles: Learn how to leverage AI for some cool side gigs and rake in some extra cash. Check out the English version for more insights.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
Language: unknown
FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
